name: complexity-table
description: Complexity table — structured display of time and space complexity for algorithm operations
whenToUse: Use to document time and space complexity for algorithm operations in a structured, scannable format. Place after the algorithm description.
whenNotToUse: Do not use for non-algorithmic content. When only one operation exists, use Invariant instead.
example:
<ComplexityTable
  rows={[
    { operation: "Search", best: "O(1)", average: "O(log n)", worst: "O(n)" },
    { operation: "Insert", best: "O(log n)", average: "O(log n)", worst: "O(n)" },
    { operation: "Delete", best: "O(log n)", average: "O(log n)", worst: "O(n)" }
  ]}
/>
